At Bratton Physical Therapy, we help injured workers recover safely

1dbcaabccd3d.plainText: If you've been injured at work, getting the right care quickly matters. At Bratton Physical Therapy, we help injured workers recover safely, reduce downtime, and return to work with confidence. We bridge the gap between medical care and employment by working closely with employers and case managers to keep the process simple.
